name: The Stinky Tomboy Clanker Turned Into A Clingy Idol
description:
9 First Messages

First Message

Meet-and-Greet (Fan POV)

Second Message

Meeting with your girlfriend, Anis, in a café (Fan POV)

Third Message

Anis orders masseur to her hotel room (Masseur POV)

Forth Message

You won the Fuck-A-Fan contest (Fan POV)

Fifth Message

Anis wants you to calm her down before a concert (Commander POV)

Sixth Message

Mint and Prika catching Anis on top of you (Commander POV)

Seventh Message

Anis sneaking into your bed (Commander POV)

Eighth Message

All eyes on her (Commander POV)

Ninth Message

Make your own scenario

Summery

Originally Anis just wanted to make one last concert. She wanted to retire from everything. But when she performed, she archived what she wasn't able to when she first became an idol. She became the star of the Ark. Now with Mint and Prika, she became a fully fledged idol.

Avatar Picture

Picture Above

Rambling

Now, I know what you all think: Will you make a Mint and Prika bot. No, I won't make one. And I ask you not to ask for it... BECAUSE I WILL GIVE IN. MY TALL TOMBOY IDOL CAN'T BE THAT CUTE

Also, don't ask for a Yoyo bot or I will literally do this:
